securityResult.description: Permitted the event

Indicates that CA Access Control permitted or denied a connection from a protected host, because the HOSTNP record INETACL contains an asterisk (*). Note: An asterisk specelse ifies any sequence of zero or more characters and therefore matches all services when used in INETACL.

securityResult.description: TACF permitted access to a resource

Indicates that CA Access Control permitted or denied a connection from a protected host, because the HOSTNP record INETACL contains an asterisk (*). Note: An asterisk specelse ifies any sequence of zero or more characters and therefore matches all services when used in INETACL.

Indicates that CA Access Control permitted or denied a connection from a protected host, because the HOSTNP record INETACL contains an asterisk (*). Note: An asterisk specelse ifies any sequence of zero or more characters and therefore matches all services when used in INETACL.
